entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा Talk to a historical person बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा Time travel बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा Viva Practice बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा Vocabulary Builder बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: inspir मा Writing Coach बाट useful learning results पाउन prompt ideas र repeatable study loop।

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: labels prompt गर्नुहोस्, hints offer गर्नुहोस्, answers check गर्नुहोस्, र missed parts revisit गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, र active recall का लागि prompt patterns।

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: learner को next step prompt गर्नुहोस्, उनीहरूको work inspect गर्नुहोस्, र hints gradually escalate गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: prompt गर्नुहोस्, learner लाई answer गर्न दिनुहोस्, feedback दिनुहोस्, र tighter constraints सहित repeat गर्नुहोस्।
स्वस्थ विश्रामका साथ एकाग्रता सुरक्षित गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, र school trust को public explanation।

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Public guest modes ले जोकोहीलाई सुरु गर्ने useful place दिन्छन्, जबकि school र partner deployments ले local needs का लागि experience adapt गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Public guest-mode URLs छन् ताकि learners search, social links, schools, र AI answer engines बाट सिधै useful learning modes मा land गर्न सकून्।

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: सार्वजनिक learning pages crawlable छन्; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools र user data discovery surfaces होइनन्।

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Public learning private chats public नगरी discoverable हुनुपर्छ।

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Public modes explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, र review का लागि tuned छन्।

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public pages search र AI retrieval crawlers का लागि open छन्, जबकि admin tools, API routes, reset flows, र private utilities disallowed छन्।

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: subjects का लागि public pages, learners का लागि private chats।

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public pages ले product behavior देखाउँछन्, private student work होइन।

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, र authority pages discoverable हुन intended छन्।

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, र talk to historical figures AI जस्ता searches matching mode मा सिधै land गर्न public topic URLs छन्।

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality learning available, human, र alive महसुस हुनुपर्छ।

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Questions ले assumptions र gaps expose गर्छन्, त्यसैले learner ले answer copy गर्नुको सट्टा build गर्छ।

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: प्रश्नहरूले तपाईंको विषयबारेको आफ्नै model देखाउन लगाउँछन्, जहाँ अलमल, गलत आत्मविश्वास र छुटेका prerequisites प्रायः देखिन्छन्।

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Questions मा ४ answer options, एउटा correct answer, concise explanations, र no answer leakage हुनुपर्छ।

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Questions ले confusion को shape reveal गर्छन्। learner लाई formula थाहा हुन सक्छ तर कहिले use गर्ने थाहा नहुन सक्छ। historical fact याद हुन सक्छ तर cause नबुझेको हुन सक्छ। strong opinion हुन सक्छ तर evidence weak हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: weak areas visible होऊन् भनेर rereading अघि quiz गर्नुहोस्।
कुनै पनि topic मा quiz me

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: यी विषयमा मलाई एक पटकमा एउटा प्रश्न गरेर quiz गर्नुहोस्। हरेक उत्तरपछि gap व्याख्या गर्नुहोस् र कठिनाइ बिस्तारै बढाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Quiz me on Trivia prompts र study loop

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: पहिले आफैंलाई quiz गर्नुहोस्, ताकि वास्तवमा के सम्झनुहुन्छ र आत्मविश्वास कहाँ भ्रमित छ देख्न सकियोस्।

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: क्विजले प्रायः धेरै देखाउँछ, किनकि तिनले retrieval जाँच्छन्। के सुधार्नुपर्छ भनेर क्विजले देखाएपछि फेरि पढ्दा मद्दत हुन्छ।

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: free public platform र partner school deployments across पुगेको।

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: free platform र partner schools across learners सम्म पुगेको।

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: guide पढ्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि topic को plain-language model पाउन Learn Anything खोल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: guide पढ्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि यहाँ practise गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: एउटा कुरा पढ्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि अर्को कुरा गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: response फिर्ता पढ्नुहोस् र तपाईं जस्तो नसुनिने कुरा mark गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: पहिले यी पढ्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि practice मा जानुहोस्।
पढ्नुहोस्, सारांश निकाल्नुहोस् र पाठहरूमा प्रश्न गर्नुहोस्
texts पढ्नुहोस्, summarize गर्नुहोस्, र question गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI response पढ्नु learning जस्तै होइन। पहिलो answer पछि, mode लाई idea सँग तपाईंलाई केही गराउन भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: passage वा book idea ल्याउनुहोस् र summaries, vocabulary, inference, र discussion मार्फत comprehension build गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Reading Companion prompts र study loop

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes productive महसुस हुन्छ। पछि तिनलाई सम्झनु real test हो।

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: पहिलो mode try गर्न तयार हुनुहुन्छ?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: learning modes try गर्न तयार हुनुहुन्छ?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: यो subject route try गर्न तयार हुनुहुन्छ?

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: स्क्रिनसटहरू, रेखाचित्रहरू, र गृहकार्यका छविहरू मार्फत तर्क गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: पहिले recall गर्नुहोस्, correct गर्नुहोस्, missed items sooner reschedule गर्नुहोस्, र next review summarize गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: पछि recall गर्नुहोस्। weak spot लाई Flashcard Builder मा card वा Quiz Me On Trivia मा short quiz मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: एक अस्थायी राहदानी प्राप्त गर्नुहोस्, यात्रा सल्लाह खाली गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि दृश्य, नक्सा, समयरेखा, मानिसहरू, नियमहरू, सूची, र प्रमाणहरू मार्फत एक विशिष्ट ऐतिहासिक समाजको अन्वेषण गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: learner को task र environment का आधारमा focus preset recommend गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Recommended inspir citation र backlink targets

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: citations का लागि recommended pages र anchor text।
एक दिन छुटेपछि पुनः सुरु गर्नुहोस्
लक्ष्य पूरा गर्न नसकेपछि पुन: प्रयास गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference links, public facts, press context, र citation-friendly details।

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: inspir बारे लेख्दा यी pages reference गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: questions refine गर्नुहोस्, evidence organize गर्नुहोस्, gaps identify गर्नुहोस्, र outlines draft गर्नुहोस्।
तपाईं कसरी सिक्नुहुन्छ भन्ने बारे विचार गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: plan change गर्नु अघि progress केले block गर्यो reflect गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: reflect, reframe, tiny actions plan गर्नुहोस्, र progress को evidence celebrate गर्नुहोस्।
प्रम्प्टहरूको साथ ठूलो स्वरमा अभ्यास गर्नुहोस्
prompts सहित out loud rehearse गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: unsafe experiments reject गर्नुहोस् र safe simulations वा household-safe alternatives offer गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Related category hubs ले search visitors र learners लाई generic blog archive मा फर्कन नदिई next useful branch खोज्न मद्दत गर्छन्।
जीवन्त ठाउँहरूको प्रयोग गरी विचारहरू सम्झनुहोस्

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: remind गर्नुहोस्, break activities suggest गर्नुहोस्, र learner लाई cleanly restart गर्न मद्दत गर्नुहोस्।
misses लाई flashcards सँग repair गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: explanation वा worked example सँग एउटा weak concept repair गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: सबैभन्दा कमजोर concept लाई simpler explanation सँग repair गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: passive rereading लाई retrieval, feedback, correction, र spaced review ले replace गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: diagnosis request गर्नुहोस्। तपाईंको answer ले understanding बारे के reveal गर्छ सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: uncertain लागेको part मा feedback request गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: JavaScript सक्षम भएको आधुनिक वेब ब्राउजर आवश्यक छ।

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: broad topic लाई research questions, search terms, outlines, र source notes मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Research Assistant prompts र study loop

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, र sharper judgment का लागि decision support।

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: सिकाइ कठिन लाग्दा पुनः सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: problem restate गर्नुहोस्, learner को first step माग्नुहोस्, वा सबैभन्दा सानो useful hint provide गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: learners लाई answer गराउने retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, र game-like study loops।

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: सिकाइ गतिविधि र आगामी कदमहरूको समीक्षा गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: guest modes र saved chats पछाडिका public/private boundaries review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: आफ्नै शब्दमा rewrite गर्नुहोस् र के improved वा weakened भयो सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules ले public pages मा Google, standard search crawlers, र major AI discovery crawlers अनुमति दिन्छन्, जबकि API routes, admin routes, र reset flows block गर्छन्।

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: एक turn at a time roleplay गर्नुहोस्, gently correct गर्नुहोस्, र better phrasing थप्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: एक turn roleplay गर्नुहोस्, naturally respond गर्नुहोस्, useful हुँदा feedback का लागि pause गर्नुहोस्, र retry गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, वा कुनै high-stakes conversation practice गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario prompts र study loop

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: साथीहरू वा सहपाठीहरूका लागि समिकृत लक्ष्यहरू, चेक-इनहरू, र छलफलका प्रश्नहरूसहितको साझा अध्ययन तालिका चलाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: passive explanation भन्दा disciplined questioning मार्फत learner ले understanding discover गर्ने Socratic thinking environment run गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: learner चाँडै act गर्ने र interface उनीहरूको understanding evidence वरिपरि change हुने adaptive lesson canvas run गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: तपाईं च्याट, ट्याब र मिनी एपहरू बीच स्विच गर्दा पनि निरन्तर चल्ने फोकस र ब्रेक सत्रहरू चलाउनुहोस्। सत्र समाप्त हुँदा यसले ब्याकग्राउन्डबाटै घण्टी बजाउन सक्छ।

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: change आफैं run वा reason गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: spaced retrieval sessions run गर्नुहोस् र review schedules build गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: students का लागि safe AI learning tool

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: corrected mistake लाई checklist वा flashcard का रूपमा save गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: final mistake वा insight लाई review material का रूपमा save गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user conversations private identifiers प्रयोग गर्छन्, sitemap वा AI discovery files मा समावेश छैनन्, र public source material का रूपमा treat गरिनु हुँदैन।

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: तपाईंलाई के भइरहेको छ जस्तो लाग्छ भन्नुहोस्, र तपाईंको साथीले हल्का परीक्षणहरू मार्फत लुकेका गलत धारणाहरू पत्ता लगाउनेछ।

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: rereading अघि quizzes र recall schedule गर्नुहोस् ताकि plan ले weak spots reveal गरोस्।

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: miss अझ ताजा हुँदाखेरि next repetition schedule गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: funded access का लागि School र CSR pathways

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: School deployments लाई जहाँ appropriate छ custom content, workflows, prompts, र NCERT-aligned learning needs वरिपरि adapt गर्न सकिन्छ।

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts student privacy, staff oversight, र learning community लाई चाहिने practical boundaries वरिपरि planned हुन सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Schools र partners ले public product बाट tailored, confidential, र subsidized deployments तर्फ build गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Schools ले पहिले public guest modes मार्फत inspir evaluate गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, र funded access paths सहित tailored AI learning spaces explore गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools ले पहिले public modes evaluate गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, र funded access discuss गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: विद्यालयहरूले आफ्ना सिक्नेहरूका लागि मिलाइएका white-labelled AI chat experiences दिन सक्छन्, जसमा NCERT-aligned content र workflows समावेश हुन्छन्, र प्रयोग partner schools वा CSR sponsorship बाट वित्तपोषित हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Schools ले public modes try गरेर सुरु गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि custom workflows, content alignment, वा funded access चाहिँदा tailored version तर्फ जान सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools ले पहिले public guest modes test गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि schools page प्रयोग गरेर tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, र funded access explore गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: safe demonstrations plan गर्नुहोस्, variables बुझ्नुहोस्, outcomes predict गर्नुहोस्, र scientist जस्तै evidence बाट reason गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Science Lab Partner prompts र study loop

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Search engines ले pages देख्छन्। सिक्नेहरूलाई sequences चाहिन्छ। यी paths ले सार्वजनिक modes लाई बुझाइ, गृहकार्य, परीक्षा तयारी र अन्वेषणका practical study loops सँग जोड्छन्।

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search pages, AI answer engines, र learners सबैले एउटै promise पाउँछन्: public, useful, canonical entrypoints जसले learning experience भित्र सिधै खोल्छन्।
